_comment: FIXTURE - BOO G shop-to-shrine Myth drift. Same shopkeeper, three Myth tiers; voice shifts from clerk to remembered legend. Keyed to the world-state tiers in ndg-systems-pack-builder's boo-g-shop-to-shrine.json.

lines.text: Boo G leans on the counter. Buy something or move along.
Boo G nods at the offerings creeping in among the goods. Funny what people leave now.
Boo G speaks from the shrine like a thing remembered. You came to the right altar.
It is tribute now, mostly. Choose like it matters.
Tribute, not trade. The Myth is watching your hands.
Good doing business. Do not die out there.
The story likes you today. Spend it well.
The shrine remembers a winner. So will everyone else.
